meta.purpose: LLM prompt to generate an Astro static page for iPhone repair services

constraints.rendering: Static HTML only — zero client-side JavaScript unless explicitly marked as `client:load` island
constraints.styling: Tailwind CSS using semantic design tokens from the provided CSS variables. NEVER use raw color values (no `bg-blue-500`, no `text-white`). Use `bg-primary`, `text-foreground`, `bg-muted`, etc.
constraints.fonts: Inter via Google Fonts, loaded in <head> with `font-display: swap`
constraints.icons: Inline SVG only — no icon library runtime. Copy SVG paths from Lucide (https://lucide.dev). Each icon must have `aria-hidden="true"` and `focusable="false"`.
constraints.images: All `` tags MUST have `alt`, `width`, `height`, and `loading="lazy"` (except hero which uses `loading="eager"`). Use Astro `` component where possible.
constraints.links_internal: Standard `<a href="/path">` — NO client-side router. All internal links must start with `/`.
constraints.links_external: All external `<a>` tags MUST have `target="_blank"` and `rel="noopener noreferrer"`.
constraints.accessibility: All interactive elements must be keyboard-accessible. Use semantic HTML (`<nav>`, `<main>`, `<section>`, `<article>`, `<footer>`). Buttons must have visible focus rings.
constraints.accordions: Use native `<details>` + `<summary>` elements. NO JavaScript accordions.
forbidden: useState, useEffect, or any React hooks
Any content not present in this JSON

page.metaTitle: iPhone Repair Winnipeg | Screen & Battery Fix | Mobile Tech Lab
page.metaDescription: Expert iPhone repair in Winnipeg & Thompson. Same-day screen replacement, battery swap, charging port & back glass repair for all iPhone models. Price match guarantee.
page.h1: iPhone Repair in Winnipeg – Fast, Affordable & Trusted
page.heroDescription: Need fast iPhone repair near you? Winnipeg trusts Mobile Tech Lab for same-day battery replacements, cracked screen fixes, charging port repairs, and back glass restoration. Our skilled technicians use high-quality parts and offer affordable pricing on all iPhone models. Walk in today or request a free quote online. We also repair iPads, MacBooks, and Apple Watches.

services.name: Screen Replacement
services.description: Cracked, shattered, or unresponsive iPhone screens repaired same-day with quality displays. All models from iPhone 6s to iPhone 16 Pro Max.

services.name: Battery Replacement
services.description: Restore your iPhone's battery health with professional replacement. Genuine Apple battery upgrades available for an additional $100.

services.name: Back Glass Repair
services.description: iPhone back glass cracked? We replace rear glass panels for iPhone 8 and newer models with quality parts.

services.name: Charging Port Repair
services.description: iPhone not charging? We repair and replace Lightning and USB-C ports for reliable charging on all models.

services.name: Camera Repair
services.description: Front or rear camera issues? We fix focus problems, black screens, and cracked camera lenses on all iPhone models.

services.name: Water Damage Repair
services.description: Dropped your iPhone in water? Our technicians assess and repair water-damaged devices with ultrasonic cleaning.

advantage_pillars.title: Same-Day Service
advantage_pillars.description: Most iPhone repairs completed in 1-2 hours while you wait.

advantage_pillars.title: Price Match Guarantee
advantage_pillars.description: Find a cheaper quote from any authorized repair shop in Winnipeg? We'll match it.

advantage_pillars.title: Warranty on Every Repair
advantage_pillars.description: Screen repair warranties vary by part tier (30 days to lifetime). 90-day battery warranty. Lifetime warranty on most other repairs.

advantage_pillars.title: Apple IRP Certified
advantage_pillars.description: Access to Genuine Apple Parts, diagnostics, and specialized tools.

model_categories.title: iPhone 16 & 15 Series
model_categories.description: Latest generation with USB-C, Dynamic Island, and A17/A18 chips.

model_categories.title: iPhone 14 & 13 Series
model_categories.description: Pro camera systems and A15/A16 chips. Same-day screen and battery repairs.

model_categories.title: iPhone 12, 11 & X Series
model_categories.description: Face ID models with OLED displays. Affordable screen and battery replacement.

model_categories.title: iPhone SE & Legacy
model_categories.description: Touch ID classics still going strong. Budget-friendly repairs for older models.

models_description: We repair every iPhone generation from the iPhone 6s to the latest iPhone 16 Pro Max. Same-day service for most models at our Winnipeg location.

pricing_micro_copy.costDriver: iPhone repair costs are primarily driven by the screen—newer Pro Max models with ProMotion displays cost more than older or standard models. Apple provides guidance on checking your iPhone's battery health.
pricing_micro_copy.priceShock: Many customers are surprised that financing often hides the true replacement cost of an iPhone, making repair a smarter financial choice. iFixit's iPhone repair guides illustrate why certain models cost more to repair.
pricing_micro_copy.advisory: If the repair cost approaches your device's value, we'll explain that clearly so you can make an informed decision.
pricing_micro_copy.fallback: When repair doesn't make sense, data recovery is often still an option.

faqs.question: How much does iPhone battery replacement cost in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: iPhone battery replacement at Mobile Tech Lab Winnipeg starts at $59 for older models and goes up to $99 for newer models like the iPhone 15 and 16 series. We also offer genuine Apple battery upgrades for an additional $100. All battery replacements include a 90-day warranty and are typically completed same-day at our St. Vital location.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day iPhone screen repair?
faqs.answer: Yes! Most iPhone screen repairs in Winnipeg are completed in 1-2 hours while you wait. Walk into our St. Vital Centre location anytime during business hours, or book an appointment online to guarantee your time slot. We stock screens for all popular iPhone models.

faqs.question: Are the parts genuine Apple or equivalent quality?
faqs.answer: We use high-quality aftermarket parts that meet or exceed OEM standards for cost-effective repairs. For customers who prefer genuine components, we offer Apple battery upgrades for $100 extra. All parts are backed by our repair warranty regardless of type.

faqs.question: Can I walk in or do I need to book ahead?
faqs.answer: Walk-ins are always welcome at our Winnipeg location in St. Vital Centre! No appointment necessary. However, booking online guarantees your time slot and helps us prepare the right parts for your specific iPhone model in advance.

faqs.question: What's the warranty on iPhone repairs?
faqs.answer: All iPhone repairs at Mobile Tech Lab come with a warranty. Screen repair warranties vary by part quality tier (starting at 30 days for budget options, up to lifetime for premium). Battery replacements are covered for 90 days. Most other component repairs include a lifetime warranty.

faqs.question: What if I find a cheaper quote in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: We offer a price match guarantee! If you find a lower quote for the same iPhone repair from any authorized repair shop in Winnipeg, show us the quote and we'll match it.

service_area_note: Serving St. Vital, Fort Garry, Garden City, Transcona, and all Winnipeg neighborhoods.

reviews.quote: Got my iPhone 14 screen replaced in under an hour at the St. Vital location. Super fast, affordable, and the staff were incredibly friendly. Best iPhone repair in Winnipeg!
reviews.author: Google Review

reviews.quote: My iPhone battery was dying by noon every day. Mobile Tech Lab replaced it same-day for way less than Apple quoted me. Phone works like new again!
reviews.author: Google Review

extra_sections.why_choose_paragraph: Looking for reliable iPhone repair in Winnipeg? Mobile Tech Lab is the city's trusted choice for fast, affordable iPhone fixes. We offer same-day service for most repairs—including battery replacements, cracked screens, charging port issues, and back glass damage. Our experienced technicians use high-quality parts that meet or exceed OEM standards, and every repair comes with a warranty for your peace of mind. We're so confident in our pricing that we offer a price match guarantee—if you find a cheaper quote from Apple or any local Winnipeg repair shop, we'll match it.
extra_sections.local_trust_paragraph: Ready to get your iPhone fixed? Winnipeg's most trusted repair shop is just a short drive away. Walk into our St. Vital Centre location—no appointment needed—and our friendly technicians will diagnose your issue for free. Most iPhone repairs are completed same-day while you wait.

validation_checklist: Page has exactly ONE <h1> tag matching the `page.h1` field
All services render with inline SVG icons, not an icon library import
All FAQ items use <details>/<summary>, not JS accordions
All external links have target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'
All three JSON-LD blocks are injected in <head>
No React, Preact, or JSX runtime in the build output
Hero image has loading='eager'; all other images have loading='lazy'
Page renders fully without JavaScript enabled
All color classes use Tailwind semantic tokens (bg-primary, text-foreground, etc.)
Phone links use tel: protocol; SMS links use sms: protocol
Section IDs match table_of_contents entries for anchor navigation
No placeholder content — every string comes from this JSON
